s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SLIDING ROOF DRIVE CABLE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, slide the sliding roof drive cable sub-assembly in the direction indicated by the arrow in the illustration to install it.

atten3.ptxt: Make sure that the spring indicated by the arrow in the illustration is securely installed.

atten4.ptxt: Hold the window deflector down, as shown in the illustration, until the sliding roof drive cable sub-assembly runs on the window deflector.

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws and install the sliding roof drip channel.
Install the 2 sliding roof side stoppers with the 2 screws.
Using a screwdriver, slide the sliding roof drive cable sub-assembly in either direction as indicated by the arrows in the illustration and align the matchmarks.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Insert the sunshade trim into the sliding roof housing sub-assembly.
Install the sliding roof piece sub-assemblies LH and RH with the 2 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SLIDING ROOF DRIVE GEAR SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the sliding roof drive gear sub-assembly with the 2 bolts.
Engage the claw and install the sliding roof room light bracket.
